parameters.name: tag
parameters.description: Returns only entries that include this tag. Matching is case-insensitive.

parameters.name: synonym_type
parameters.description: Returns only entries with the specified relationship type.

schema.description:
Defines how the `term` relates to its synonyms.

- EQUIVALENT: Treat all terms as interchangeable.
- ONE_WAY: Expand only from `term` to `synonyms`.
- GROUP: Treat all synonyms as interchangeable within the group.
schema.title: SynonymType

parameters.name: term
parameters.description: Returns entries whose `term` contains this value. Supports partial matching.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Returns the specified page of results.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Sets the number of entries to return per page. Maximum is 100.
